# ASD Digital

> Real estate lead generation agency based in Phoenix, Arizona. We run paid ad campaigns (Google, Meta, TikTok) and build custom landing pages that deliver exclusive, phone-verified buyer and seller leads to real estate agents, teams, and brokerages.

## Services

- **Real Estate Lead Generation**: Exclusive leads via paid ads. One agent per ZIP code. $18-$35 cost per lead. 30+ leads/month typical.
- **Real Estate Advertising**: Google Search, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok ad campaigns. Creative refreshed every 14 days. Full funnel from awareness to conversion.
- **Real Estate Websites**: Custom landing pages and IDX websites built to convert at 8-12% (vs 2.6% industry average). Not templates.

## Markets Served

Phoenix, Scottsdale, Tempe, Mesa, Chandler, Gilbert — all of Greater Phoenix / Maricopa County, Arizona.

## What Makes Us Different

- One agent per ZIP code exclusivity — your leads are never shared
- Speed-to-lead automation texts leads within 60 seconds
- Custom landing pages included with every campaign (not templates)
- No long-term contracts
- Phoenix-based team that only works with real estate clients
- Phone-verified leads pushed directly to your CRM or phone

## Pricing

- Solo agents: starting at $800-$1,000/month
- Teams and brokerages: $1,500-$5,000/month including ad spend and management
- No setup fees, no long-term contracts
